name_en: New Wax Leather Shoulder Bag🎉 Double Buckle Soft Lux🎉🎉 This leather handbag features a simple and exquisite design, with a glossy finish that exudes a classical atmosphere. It showcases a modern casual attitude, and the long handle is convenient for shoulder carrying. Leather pocket on the back, enamel triangle metal, magnetic snap closure. Large capacity. Extremely useful 👏 Absolutely a must-have for fashionistas, get yours now!
name_cn:

Size: 31x15x12cm
